text:
(a) On receipt of a certificate of title, the owner of a motor vehicle shall write the owner’s name in ink in the space provided on the certificate.

(b) Upon transfer of ownership, the seller shall complete assignment of title by signing and printing the seller’s name, printing the date of transfer, and printing the purchaser’s name and address on the title.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.028 — Signatures

(a) On receipt of a certificate of title, the owner of a motor vehicle shall write the owner’s name in ink in the space provided on the certificate.

(b) Upon transfer of ownership, the seller shall complete assignment of title by signing and printing the seller’s name, printing the date of transfer, and printing the purchaser’s name and address on the title.

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 969 (S.B.2076), Sec. 6, eff. September 1, 2017.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: On receipt of a certificate of title, the owner of a motor vehicle shall write the owner’s name in ink in the space provided on the certificate.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Upon transfer of ownership, the seller shall complete assignment of title by signing and printing the seller’s name, printing the date of transfer, and printing the purchaser’s name and address on the title.
